info.title: General API (Nextis.ERP.API)
info.description:
This is the general data exchange application interface based on Nextis.Core.API standard and compatible with any system in the scope of the Nextis application network. This interface provides communication and data exchange either among Nextis product portfolio or with third-party systems.

Release notes for current version at nextis.zone

Operated by


MROAUTO AUTODÍLY s.r.o.
Čs. armády 360, 735 51 Bohumín Pudlov, CZ
TAX ID: 06630405 | main language: cs | www.mroauto.cz

Integration support

For suppliers

Nextis.Core.API
(.NET standard 2.0) | download package from: nuget.org
Create your own nextis-compatible API endpoint within the Nextis network using nextis.api nuget package.

For customers

Nextis.Core.API.Client
(.NET standard 2.0) | download package from: nuget.org
Implement API efortlessly with Nextis.API.Client package from nuget.org.

post.description:
Provides catalog items "on demand" checking functionality by code and brand.
Method supports checking multiple items at the same time (supports list of items).

The amount of requests par day or items per request might be independently limited (controlled) by the API operator and so it might differ from the default limitation.</br>
The limitation, configured by default, is 100 requests per day and 1000 items per request.

400.description: [Bad Request] The request was invalid. A list of errors will be returned.

500.description: [Internal Server Error] An unexpected error internal to the application has occurred.

401.description: [Unathorized] Access token is not or could not be authenticated.

post.description:
Provides catalog items "on demand" checking functionality by internal ID.
Method supports checking multiple items at the same time (supports list of items).

The amount of requests par day or items per request might be independently limited (controlled) by the API operator and so it might differ from the default limitation.</br>
The limitation, configured by default, is 100 requests per day and 1000 items per request.

400.description: [Bad Request] The request was invalid. A list of errors will be returned.

500.description: [Internal Server Error] An unexpected error internal to the application has occurred.

401.description: [Unathorized] Access token is not or could not be authenticated.

post.description:

The limitation, configured by default, is 100 requests per day and 1000 items per request.

400.description: [Bad Request] The request was invalid. A list of errors will be returned.

post.description:
Provides the list of issued invoices within the specified date and time range and according to the specified parameter.

In case you are authenticated as headquarter it allows you to get all documents issued to your company by setting request paramater LoadAll to true.</br>

400.description: [Bad Request] The request was invalid. A list of errors will be returned.

500.description: [Internal Server Error] An unexpected error internal to the application has occurred.

401.description: [Unathorized] Access token is not or could not be authenticated.

qtyAvailableMain.description: The quantity that is available on the warehouse you are assigned to

qtyAvailableProduction.description: The quantity that is not available immediately but supplier is capable to assembly it

qtyAvailableOther.description: The quantity that is available on other warehouse you are allowed to see

qtyAvailableSupplier.description: The quantity that is available on target system suppliers

returnNote.description: Return note of the item (if provided)

reliabilityOverQty.description: Quantity over which may price start varying

vatRate.description: Current VAT rate of the item.

Nextis.NSCore.API.Catalogs.CatalogItemPr.description: Informs that price may vary according to requested quantity or is fixed

items.description: List of items to get info about

prefix.description: Prefix for code Note: for the time being used for Motoprofil (PL) only and for other suppliers behind this API is currently useless.

brand.description: Brand name (or brand ID) of the catalog item. Note: either name or id must be provided as string (in quotations).

pairID.description:
Internal Id of yours

Variable you may use for the backward pairing of your item</br>

internalID.description: Allows to find, validate and order items through its internal ID instead of finding them throghout the code and brand. Note: To make this option work the request field "SearchTarget" must be set to "InternalID". Code and brand not need to be provided.

successRatio.description: Provides information of how many items from request have been found and returned in the result (100 = all items have been found)

items.description: List of items to get info about

successRatio.description: Provides information of how many items from request have been found and returned in the result (100 = all items have been found)

code.description: EngineID according to the TecDoc database (aka K-type).

brandIDs.description: Limits the result by given list of brand ID according to the TecDoc database.

genArtID.description: Limits the result by the generic article ID according to the TecDoc database.

engineID.description: EngineID according to the TecDoc database (aka K-type).

genArtID.description: ID of the generic article according to the TecDoc database.

login.description: Login, obtained from the API owner

password.description: Password, obtained from the API owner

token.description: API key, obtained when authentication succeeded

tokenValidTo.description:
Validity of the API key

(depends on the API configuration, default 120 minute)</br>

Nextis.NSCore.API.Documents.DeliveryNote.description: Contais delivery note specific information and delivery note items

dateFrom.description:
Start date of the delivery notes list

(is always considered as the beginning of the day, regardless of the time provided)</br>

dateTo.description:
End date of the delivery notes list

(is always considered as the end of the day, regardless of the time provided)</br>

loadAll.description:
If given authentication token belongs to the headquarters and this property is set to true, all delivery notes for all subsidiaries will be returned. Otherwise only delivery notes issued for the headquarter will be returned

(default = true)</br>

code.description:
Code of the item

(provided only for service or goods item types)</br>

brand.description:
Brand of the item

(provided only for goods item type)</br>

priceUnitIncVAT.description: Unit price of the item (including VAT)

priceTotalIncVAT.description: Total price of the item (including VAT)

intrastatCode.description: Intrastat code of the item (if provided)

unitWeightNetto.description: Unit weight (netto Kg) of the item

documentNumber.description: Invoice number to search and return invoice file for

variableSymbol.description: Variable symbol of the invoice (used for wire-transfer payment)

amountAdvance.description: Amount that has been paid in advance

amountPaid.description: Amount that has been already paid

Nextis.NSCore.API.Documents.Invoices.Inv.description: Contais invoice specific information and invoice items

dateFrom.description:
Start date of the invoice list

(is always considered as the beginning of the day, regardless of of time provided)</br>

dateTo.description:
End date of the invoice list

(is always considered as the end of the day, regardless of the time provided)</br>

loadAll.description:
If given authentication token belongs to the headquarters and this property is set to true, all invoices for all subsidiaries will be returned. Otherwise only invoices issued for the headquarter will be returner

(default = true)</br>

Nextis.NSCore.API.Orders.OrderType.description: Order type (might be not supported in all target systems)

keepBackOrder.description: Keep back order in the target system if goods are not available at the moment of the order placement

separatedDocument.description: Request to issue separated document for given order

waitNextOrder.description: Request to do not deliver given order unless there exists other order to delivery

confirmOptionalPromotionItems.description: Confirms adding optional promotion items to order

prefix.description: Prefix for code Note: for the time being used for Motoprofil (PL) only and for other suppliers behind this API is currently useless.

brand.description: Brand name (or brand ID) of the catalog item. Note: either name or id must be provided as string (in quotations).

pairID.description:
Internal Id of yours

Variable you may use for the backward pairing of your item</br>

internalID.description: Allows to find, validate and order items through its internal ID instead of finding them throghout the code and brand. Note: To make this option work the request field "SearchTarget" must be set to "InternalID". Code and brand not need to be provided.

searchedFor.description: Information about how the item was found

userNote.description: Provide your note on order item (optional)

items.description: List of inserted items of order/orders

orders.description: List of all orders created throughout given request (commonly only one order is created with some exceptions, such as using the functionality to auto split orders amongst subsidiaries, etc.)

qtyCommited.description: Commited quantity (based on back-order setting and current availability)

unitPriceCommited.description: Commited unit price in customer currrency

totalPriceCommited.description: Commited total price in user currency

Nextis.NSCore.API.Orders.Sending.Respons.description: Additional information that item has been or has not been ordered properly

qtyToDelivery.description: The quantity available for immediate delivery

qtyToDelieveryOther.description: The quantity available for delivery from delivery form other subsidiaries

qtyBackOrder.description:
The quantity that is not available neither in the main warehouse nor other warehouses
(valid only if BackOrder=true)

qtyCancelled.description:
The quantity that is not available neither in the main warehouse nor other warehouses
(valid only if BackOrder=False)

Nextis.NSCore.API.Orders.Validation.Resp.description: Additional information that item is found and valid

debtsOverdue.description: Currend debts overdue in configured currency

debstDeliveryNotes.description: Current debts without invoice in configured currency

exceeded.description:
Is or isn't exceeded the credit limitation

(before due date or overdue)</br>

accessibleWarehouses.description: List of supplier warehouses, accessible for given credentials (token)

Nextis.NSCore.API.Partners.Info.Address.description: Address of the subsidiary (also so-called delivery address)

accessibleWarehouses.description: List of supplier warehouses, accessible for given credentials (token)

vatID2.description: Company VAT ID 2 (mainly used in Slovakia)
